race.description: Fred Vella Tyre & Crash Repair Benchmark 56 Hcp
race.comment: ACT OF TREACHERY (8) was good in her debut prep and looks to have come back in good order. Jumped out sharply behind Pure Bliss in readiness, who has since come out and won in town. Progressive type that can make the perfect return. AZTEC DANCER (6) has rediscovered some of her best form and will appreciate the anticipated tempo. Will drop straight back to the tail from the wide draw and be looking to round them up over a course and distance she relishes. REINE OF NINE (12) was good here fresh behind a heavily supported favourite. Is sure to have come on from that and keeps Toeroek from a good draw. Should be blending into it nicely at the top of the straight and will get her chance. REAL DELUXE (9) makes her stable debut and has peaks that measure up over the border. Keeping safe.
